title: Cursed Fate: Celestial Wheel
description: This mode adds an custom cursed technique to Cursed Fate
body:
## **Celestial Wheel Cursed Techniqe**

**1. Adaptation:** The ability functions passively with each type of damage received the player receives an adaptation that creates increasingly stronger resistance up to total immunity with each defense boost the player receives full regeneration all adaptations disappear upon death

**2. Light Sword:** The player creates a sword with their occult energy and can destroy it by reusing the ability

**Flow: Light Spears:** throw three light spears

**Cursed Transformation:** the ability becomes "Sword of Extermination" increases melee damage

**3. Light Explosion:** the player creates an explosion

**Flow:** increases the explosion's range and damage

**Cursed Transformation:** becomes Divine Nuke

**4. First Round:** Bonus effects for the player for 1 minute

**Flow:** Increases the power of buffs

**Cursed Transformation:** Fully regenerates the player

**5. Slash:** deals damage to the targeted entity

**Cursed Transformation:** World Slash

**6. Cursed Transformation:** transforms the player into Mahoraga and boosts their power in this form the player is almost invincible but reverts to human form after 3 minutes and remains unconscious for 1 minute
